c.d: Maximum file size allowed for transfer, impacting the ability to share large media files or documents.
Security measures, including encryption, password protection, and two-factor authentication, ensure data privacy during transfer.
Intuitive interface and simple transfer process contribute to user-friendliness, especially for non-technical users.
Compatibility with various operating systems (Windows, macOS, iOS, Android) ensures accessibility across different devices.
Amount of free storage available for storing and sharing files, affecting the overall cost and convenience.
